articles.author: Noah Robertson, Ellen Nakashima, Warren P. Strobel
articles.title: Russia is providing Iran intelligence to target U.S. forces, officials say - The Washington Post
articles.description: The targeting information has included the locations of American warships and aircraft in the Middle East, the officials said.
articles.content: Russia is providing Iran with targeting information to attack American forces in the Middle East, the first indication that another major U.S. adversary is participating even indirectly in the war, a… [+58 chars]

articles.title: Austin shooting suspect was Tesla employee who assaulted co-worker, lawsuit says - Austin American-Statesman
articles.description: A new lawsuit says Tesla failed to address warning signs before a former employee allegedly assaulted a 65-year-old co-worker.
